zero_games: You literally don't play chess in this window. Go hang a piece and come back.
ghost_username: Chess.com has no record of this user. Either you hallucinated your username or the site is gaslighting us.

fallback_headlines: The numbers are in. The dignity is out.
Your pieces wrote impact statements. It got dark.

center_war: The center squares logged {center_total} captures. Urban renewal never looked this violent.
time_absurd: {overthink_seconds_display}s on {overthink_san} is not thinking — it's negotiating with entropy.
botez_arc: {botez_games} games with queen-hang theater — {botez_clean_games} were textbook donations, the rest were improv night.
The queen stepped out for air in {botez_games} games. {botez_clean_games} were clean hangs; the rest were spicy sequels.
spite_arc: {spite_checks} spite-check salutes before resignation. Petty. Respect.
dirty_arc: {dirty_flags} flag-vulture wins while down serious material. The clock is not a personality.
french_arc: {french_games} French structures. Pawns on e6 filed a HR complaint.
london_arc: {london_games} London System entries. Your bishop on f4 has tenure.
bongcloud_arc: {bongcloud_games} Bongcloud sightings. The king wanted screen time.
stats_paper_tiger: Puzzle rating {tactics_hi} vs live near {max_live_rating} — you grind motifs faster than you grind rating.
Tactics say {tactics_hi}; the board says {max_live_rating}. One of them is lying, and it isn't the clock.
stats_peak_drop: Rating archaeology: {peak_best} → {peak_last} in {peak_mode}. The graph is a gentle slope; the ego is a cliff.
You peaked at {peak_best} in {peak_mode}. Today you're at {peak_last}. The archive remembers; the present negotiates.
stats_timeout: Timeout rate near {timeout_pct_display}% — you outsource checkmates to the increment.
{timeout_pct_display}% timeouts: the pieces are still on the board but you've mentally logged off.
stats_fide: FIDE field empty. The international ledger has not subscribed to your newsletter.
No FIDE rating on file — billions of online half-moves, zero bureaucratic recognition. Grim.
brain_freeze_arc: {brain_freeze_games} games where a long think met a violent eval drop. Think of it as meditation with consequences.
{brain_freeze_games} brain-freeze specials: sixty-plus seconds of cinema, three pawns of regret.
eval_plunge_arc: {overthink_seconds_display}s on {overthink_san} torched about {overthink_eval_drop:.1f} pawns of eval. The think was research; the move was sabotage.
You donated ~{overthink_eval_drop:.1f} pawns while staring at {overthink_san} for {overthink_seconds_display}s. Performance art.
psy_red_zone: {rz_moves} moves played under 10% time — win rate in those games near {rz_win_rate:.0f}%. The red zone is not a personality trait.
You keep signing checks the increment can't cash: {rz_moves} red-zone moves, {rz_win_rate:.0f}% wins when the clock is screaming.
psy_tilt: After losses you re-queue in about {tilt_avg_queue:.1f}s on average; max {tilt_max_loss_streak} losses in one binge session. Hydrate. Breathe.
{tilt_max_loss_streak} losses back-to-back in one sitting with sub-{tilt_avg_queue:.1f}s queue discipline — the tab is not a stress ball.
psy_hhi: Opening HHI ≈ {opening_hhi:.0f} — your first five plies are a monoculture. Theory ends; panic begins.
HHI {opening_hhi:.0f} on a 10k scale: fewer distinct trees than a parking lot. Rivals can wait out the homework.
psy_autopilot: Mean opening spend σ ≈ {mean_opening5_std:.2f}s — metronome mode — plus instant replies to weird sidelines. Muscle memory, zero radar.
First-five clock variance is flatlined at {mean_opening5_std:.2f}s while you blitz past rare moves. You're speedrunning autopilot, not chess.
stats_tournament_first: Wow, first in a tournament. Only took you {tournament_tries_phrase}.
stats_tournament_field: I hope you're not highly invested in chess.
